subcodes.first_line: The resplendent light and radiant brilliance from the Supreme Horizon hath enveloped the dust that containeth thy pure and sanctified sepulcher [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النور الساطع و الضیاء اللامع من الافق الاعلی غشی ثری تضمن جدثک الطاهر المطهر
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @visitation Tablets, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @martyrs and martyrdom
